scenario: Test a valid request with required parameters q and days for ocean coordinates
Test a valid request with all optional parameters included
Test a valid request using unixdt instead of dt parameter
Test request with days=1 (minimum enum value) returns exactly 1 forecast day
Test request with days=7 (maximum enum value) returns up to 7 forecast days
Test request with valid hour parameter filters hourly data correctly
Test request with hour parameter at minimum boundary (midnight)
Test request with hour parameter at maximum boundary (11 PM)
Test request with valid language code returns localized condition text
Test request with high precision decimal coordinates
Test that response contains complete location object with all required fields
Test that response contains complete forecast object with forecastday array
Test that response contains marine-specific hourly data like sig_ht_mt and swell data
Test that response contains astronomy data with sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset
Test request without required q parameter returns error code 1003
Test request without required days parameter returns error
Test request without any required parameters returns error code 1003
Test request with coordinates not on sea/ocean (Beijing - inland) returns error code 1006
Test request with malformed q parameter returns error code 1006
Test request with empty q parameter returns error code 1003 or 1006
Test request with days parameter below minimum value (0) returns error
Test request with days parameter above maximum value (8) returns error
Test request with negative days parameter returns error
Test request with invalid dt date format returns error
Test request with dt date in the past returns error about date range
Test request with dt date more than 7 days in future returns error
Test request with unix timestamp in the past (2020-01-01) returns error
Test request with hour parameter above 23 returns error
Test request with negative hour parameter returns error
Test request with special characters (XSS attempt) in q parameter returns error code 1006
Test request with SQL injection attempt in q parameter returns error code 1006
Test request with latitude outside valid range (91) returns error code 1006
Test request with longitude outside valid range (181) returns error code 1006
Test request with null string as q parameter returns error
Test request with empty language parameter defaults to English
Test request with days=4 (middle enum value) returns correct forecast days
Test request with days=6 returns correct number of forecast days
Test request with German language code returns localized response
Test request with Chinese language code returns localized response
Test request with southern hemisphere ocean coordinates
Test request with Miami coastal coordinates
Test request with noon hour parameter
Test request with early morning hour parameter (6 AM)
Test request with evening hour parameter (5 PM)
Test request with alphanumeric invalid q parameter returns error code 1006
Test request with incomplete coordinates (missing longitude) returns error
Test request with incomplete coordinates (missing latitude) returns error
Test request with extra coordinate value returns error
Test request with space-separated coordinates instead of comma returns error
